channel.title: MSCI — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on MSCI (MSCI Inc) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED MSCI (-22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed MSCI in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED MSCI (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added MSCI in Q4 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED MSCI (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed MSCI in Q4 2025 · 3.3% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED MSCI (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added MSCI in Q4 2025 · 15.3% of portfolio. Index monopoly add.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Dev Kantesaria)
